headline: Viatris Eyes Specialty Shift As FDA Reviews MR-141 Presbyopia Drug
summary: Viatris (NasdaqGS:VTRS) is shifting its business toward specialty-focused healthcare, moving beyond its traditional emphasis on generic medicines. The US FDA has accepted for review a supplemental New Drug Application for MR-141 (phentolamine ophthalmic solution) targeting presbyopia. This FDA step comes as the company pursues debt reduction, divestitures, acquisitions and a new product mix centered on higher-margin specialty treatments, including ophthalmology.
